SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALENA, THIAGO L. $1,170.20 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
